nodes.name: Temminck's seedeater
nodes.summary: Temminck's seedeater (Sporophila falcirostris) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in eastern South America, mainly in far northeastern Argentina and along the southeastern Brazilian coastline. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. This bird's common name commemorates the Dutch naturalist Coenraad Jacob Temminck. References
